name: flow-05-branch-a-completion-points-ledger
description: Branch A: T83 CompletionRecorder → T84 PointsCalculator → T85 LedgerUpdater. SETNX idempotency on T83, server-side calculation on T84, atomic ledger write on T85.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation: T83 SETNX check, T84 earnedPoints absent from input, T85 atomic incrementAndRecord
Retrieve server-side-calculation and timezone-streak patterns for FLOW-05 Branch A
Break into: T83 (SETNX + answers from store + CompletionRecorded) + T84 (server-side points from raw answers) + T85 (atomic ledger write waits T84+T96)

Generate completion-recorder.service.ts (T83), points-calculator.service.ts (T84), ledger-updater.service.ts (T85). T83 SETNX on (questionnaireId, userId). T84 input has no earnedPoints. T85 atomic incrementAndRecord.
Score against iron rules: T83 idempotency, T84 server-side, T85 atomic
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
